title: Visual Suspicious Stews
description: A pack which displays the effect obtained from a suspicious stew
body:
![bouncy](https://media.giphy.com/media/455WF0JHs6BuOZOhhA/giphy.gif)
![screm](https://media.giphy.com/media/utBkTMawcgzc5euJ3O/giphy.gif)

Ever wanted to know the effect of a suspicious stew?

This pack will show you which effect the stew has with a visual animation!

This only applies for survival obtainable stews, which means any stew with an uncommon effect won't be displayed differently.

Extra feature:Stews renamed to "Spicy Stews" since they're not suspicious anymore with this pack.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/40BeSaYX/images/fb098072ccd281a22d5d5d17f78f1b14bb9eb33b.webp)
